hero.art_prompt: Meera, a 29 year old Indian woman in a modest kurta, smiling as she studies on a laptop at a tidy desk at home in a smaller town, bright daytime, warm and aspirational.

panels.narration: Meera's town had no campus with a strong MBA.
panels.dialogue: Do I have to move away?
panels.img_prompt: Meera, 29, in a modest kurta at her window looking toward a faraway city skyline, an MBA brochure in hand, thoughtful and hopeful, small-town home.

panels.narration: Relocating for a distant campus was not an option.
panels.dialogue: My life and work are here.
panels.img_prompt: Meera looking torn while glancing between a suitcase and family and work responsibilities at home, warm modest room, conflicted expression.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised MBA she could do from home.
panels.dialogue: A campus, in my own room!
panels.img_prompt: Meera's face lighting up with relief and excitement at a laptop showing an online MBA she can do from home, warm glow, tidy home study corner.

panels.narration: Now she studies at home, her degree on track.
panels.img_prompt: Meera happily attending an online MBA class on her laptop at home, notebook beside her, supportive family nearby, warm and encouraging.

turn.title: Why A From-Home MBA Works
points: Study 100% online from anywhere. No relocation, no hostel, no commute.
The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MBA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your life and work.
Just ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.

testimonials.name: Meera Nair
testimonials.quote: There was no good campus in my town. Studying from home let me earn a real MBA without leaving.

testimonials.name: Rekha Das
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI fit my budget, and I never had to move away from my family or my job.

testimonials.name: Aarti Rao
testimonials.quote: A recognised degree earned from home. It was accepted without question when I switched roles.

testimonials.name: Latha S
testimonials.quote: I studied around home responsibilities and still graduated on time. That flexibility meant everything.

facts.v: 100% online from home, weekend live classes
Same recognised MBA, no hostel or commute
UGC-entitled online MBA, NAAC A++ accredited
